commit_scope: Heal an intermittent Hostinger Auto Deploy failure by retrying SSH host-key discovery before web rollout.

commands:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
path = Path('.github/workflows/hostinger-auto-deploy.yml')
text = path.read_text()
required = ['ssh-keyscan -T 10 -H "$host"', 'max_attempts=5', '::warning::ssh-keyscan attempt', '::error::ssh-keyscan failed']
missing = [item for item in required if item not in text]
print({'missing': missing})
raise SystemExit(1 if missing else 0)
PY

python3 - <<'PY'
import yaml
with open('.github/workflows/hostinger-auto-deploy.yml', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    data = yaml.safe_load(f)
print({'workflow': data.get('name'), 'jobs': sorted(data.get('jobs', {}))})
PY
git fetch origin main && git rebase origin/main
